subject: Re: warp flipping part of the image to the other end
body:
Hi,

This is caused because Warp fails to properly handle the MRC extended header.
This was discussed in CryoEM Cafe discord (#software-general, Jan 13rd 2021)
together with a workaround.

Best regards,

Takanori Nakane

2021年7月9日(金) 22:39 Matthias Vorländer <mvorlaender@gmail.com>:

>
> Hi there,
>
> I am processing falcon 4  SPA data in MRC format (gain normalized) in warp , and warp is producing a strange artefact where part of the image is flipped on the other side (see screenshot). Any idea what causes this?
>
> Thanks a lot in advance,
> Best,
> Matthias
>
> --
